items.title: AI law startup Norm raises $120M, hits unicorn valuation
items.summary: AI law startup Norm has raised a $120 million Series C round led by Khosla Ventures, valuing the startup at $1.2 billion.

items.title: Public GitHub Issue Could Trick GitHub Agentic Workflows Into Leaking Private Repo Data
items.summary: A public issue can trick GitHub Agentic Workflows into leaking the contents of an organization's private repositories, researchers at Noma Security have shown. The attacker needs only to open a normal-looking issue on a public repository, with no stolen credentials and no acces…

items.title: The foundational elements of AI architecture that IT leaders need to scale
items.summary: With the rapid progress of AI capabilities and the move to agentic systems, organizations are expanding their use cases as the technology continues to grow. That constant evolution also introduces risk, leaving IT leaders to wonder which investments will prove valuable even six…

items.title: How Open Models Are Driving AI Research
items.summary: Every year, the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) reveals where thousands of AI researchers have decided to put their work. This year’s accepted papers reveal a clear direction: open frontier models and open AI infrastructure have become foundational to how mo…

items.title: Why the rise of open source AI isn’t hurting Anthropic … yet
items.summary: Open source models’ success isn’t coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.

items.title: Savi’s app aims to protect consumers from realistic AI scams like kidnappers demanding ransom
items.summary: The company just raised $7 million in seed funding, and is launching its app for iPhone and Android on Tuesday.

items.title: Smart glasses maker Even Realities hits $1B valuation with $150M funding led by Meituan, Tencent
items.summary: Even Realities, an ex-Apple team building camera-free smart glasses, raised $150 million from Meituan and Tencent at a $1 billion valuation.
